changes.value:
## What

`swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/doctor/checks.rs:299-355` hardcodes a rust-analyzer-only LSP check. The code-context doctor at `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/doctor.rs` already has `get_lsp_servers_for_type()` mapping project types to LSP servers, and the LSP registry at `swissarmyhammer-lsp/src/registry.rs` has YAML-loaded specs with install hints. The CLI doctor should use one of these instead of its own hardcoded check.

**Affected files:**
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/doctor/checks.rs` — replace `check_lsp_servers()` 
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/doctor/mod.rs` — may need to pass detected project types

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cargo run -- doctor` reports status of typescript-language-server when a package.json exists in the workspace
- [ ] `cargo run -- doctor` still reports rust-analyzer status for Rust projects
- [ ] Missing LSPs show install hints from the registry/YAML config
- [ ] Multi-project workspaces check all relevant LSPs

## Tests
- [ ] Update `test_lsp_servers_check` in checks.rs to verify multiple LSP types
- [ ] `cargo nextest run --package swissarmyhammer-cli`
CLI doctor: use pluggable LSP registry instead of hardcoded rust-analyzer check
